title: DuckDuckGo search saw 28% more visits after Google said people love AI mode
summary: DuckDuckGo 在谷歌宣称用户喜爱AI模式后的一周内，访问量增长了近28%，反映出用户对无AI搜索的偏好。
highlights: DuckDuckGo search saw 28% more visits after Google said people love AI mode
nearly 28 percent more visits in the week following Google's insistence that people love AI mode
